message:
test(fcp-host): expand error and budget test suites

- error.rs: +35 tests (22→57) — Display format verification for all
  variants, Debug trait, source chain, HostResult type parameters,
  special characters, variant discrimination, dyn Error upcast
- budget.rs: +57 tests (52→109) — BudgetAction traits, evaluation
  to_error, aggregate metrics, MetricWindow boundaries, BudgetTracker
  multi-zone/multi-metric, policy engine async tests, snapshots

fcp-host lib tests: 1170 total, all passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
